overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a long coat exploring a foggy Victorian-era city street at night. The character walks along wet cobblestone streets past historic buildings with gas lamps, through a covered stone archway, and into an inner courtyard with scattered autumn leaves.

events.description: character turns slightly left approaching the stone archway entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy cobblestone street toward the illuminated stone archway

ornate cast-iron street lamp with warm yellow glow
large historic stone archway entrance with multiple vaulted openings
tall stone building with tall windows and decorative facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy Victorian street at night, passing a corner shop with a green awning illuminated by a warm gas lamp. The cobblestone street leads toward a large stone archway in the distance, with historic townhouses lining the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone archway passage with vaulted ceiling

events.description: character enters the covered stone archway from the open street
approaching the exit of the covered passage, brighter courtyard visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the misty covered passage with massive stone pillars lining the path

entered.detail: arched stone ceiling of the covered walkway with weathered texture
massive cylindrical stone columns supporting the archway structure
yellow-brown brick wall with mounted lantern fixtures
wall-mounted gas lights casting warm illumination

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered stone archway, transitioning from the open street to an enclosed passage with a vaulted ceiling. Massive stone pillars line the path while wall-mounted lanterns illuminate the brick walls, creating a moody, sheltered atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open inner courtyard surrounded by historic buildings

events.description: character exits the covered archway into the open courtyard
approaching building with distinctive red-lit window

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard toward a building with an illuminated red window, passing wooden crates

entered.detail: three-story stone building with white window frames and dark facade
window emitting distinctive warm red-orange light
stacked wooden barrels and crates near the archway exit
scattered brown autumn leaves on the wet cobblestones

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered archway into an open courtyard, the character walks toward a historic building with a distinctive red-lit window. The ground is scattered with autumn leaves and wooden crates, while the stone archway recedes into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a foggy Victorian street through a sheltered passage and into a secluded inner courtyard. It begins by trailing a character past a corner shop with a green awning and warm gas lamps, moving along wet cobblestones lined with historic townhouses. As the character advances, the open street transitions into a covered stone archway, where the environment shifts to an enclosed passage defined by a vaulted ceiling and lanterns casting light on massive stone pillars. The scene then opens as the camera emerges from the archway into a courtyard scattered with autumn leaves and wooden crates. Finally, the view settles on a historic building featuring a distinctive red-lit window as the stone passage recedes into the background.
